contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Document Places API caching architecture in agentic_ai_context for future LLMs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/88
  
  Details:
  New PLACES_API_CACHING.md in agentic_ai_context — canonical reference for how the Places API caching architecture works after the 2026-04-30 → 2026-05-03 PR series. Documents: (1) TL;DR — always go through scripts/places_cache.py never hit maps.googleapis.com directly, (2) Cache repo schema with positive + negative records via google_status field, (3) Token requirements — PLACES_CACHE_PAT MUST be in every workflow's env: block (PR #99 lesson), (4) Process-level circuit breaker, (5) Field tiers — Atmosphere fields NEVER requested, (6) Why we stayed on Legacy Places not New, (7) Hit List qualification pipeline post-PR #101 — site crawl is canonical qualifier, (8) Reference table of every direct caller of cache helpers, (9) Bootstrap script (PR #103), (10) Diagnostic playbook for cost spikes — Cloud Monitoring on get-data-io with example code, places-cache commit log, math sanity check, (11) Diagnostic timeline 2026-04-30 → 2026-05-03 with PR links, (12) Future work — Find Place caching, warm-up draft photo context, re-evaluate Places API (New).
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
